name: Sir Cedric
background: Sworn defender of Blackmoor, last of its garrison

techniques.name: Shield Bash
techniques.description: A driving blow with the shield rim to stagger a foe and break their guard.

techniques.name: Riposte
techniques.description: A parry turned instantly into a counter-thrust through the opening.

personality: Dutiful to a fault, weary, and unbroken. Would rather die at his post than abandon it, but is not too proud to parley if it might spare the wounded still inside.
tone: Formal and plainspoken, the courtesy of a tired man who still means every word of his oath.

plotPoints.description: The burning gatehouse groans — Cedric knows it will come down soon, sealing the ward for good.
